wiki.summary: "Music" is a song by underscores that serves as the lead single from her upcoming third studio album, released by Mom+Pop Music on June 27, 2025. On April 11, 2025, underscores debuted the song at Coachella 2025. On May 24, this song was played at her and umru's DJ set @ TheLotRadio. On June 6, underscores posted an HQ snippet of the song on TikTok. On June 25, she officially released a teaser to the music video and announced the song would be dropping on June 27. Read more on Last.fm.
